programs.name: Computer Science
programs.description: Algorithms, systems, and software engineering. Heavy mathematics requirement; strong placement in industry and graduate school.

programs.name: Electrical and Computer Engineering
programs.description: Circuits, signals, embedded systems, and VLSI. Shares foundational math with CS; close collaboration with Physics.

programs.name: Mechanical Engineering
programs.description: Thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, materials, and design. Strong industry co-op program.

programs.name: Civil Engineering
programs.description: Infrastructure, structural analysis, environmental systems, and transportation. ASCE capstone competition.

programs.name: Chemistry
programs.description: Organic, inorganic, analytical, and physical chemistry. ACS-certified program with active research placement.

programs.name: Biochemistry
programs.description: Molecular biology, metabolism, enzymology, and structural biology. Pre-professional track feeds medical and PhD programs.

programs.name: Biology
programs.description: Cell biology, genetics, ecology, and evolution. Dual emphasis on laboratory research and field science.

programs.name: Mathematics
programs.description: Pure and applied mathematics, statistics, and analysis. Strong bridge to graduate programs in math, CS, and economics.

programs.name: Statistics
programs.description: Probability theory, statistical inference, regression, and data analysis. Co-listed electives with Computer Science.

programs.name: Physics
programs.description: Classical mechanics, electromagnetism, quantum mechanics, and relativity. Research track in astrophysics and condensed matter.

programs.name: Economics
programs.description: Microeconomics, macroeconomics, econometrics, and public policy. Strong quantitative emphasis; feeds MBA and law programs.

programs.name: Political Science
programs.description: Comparative politics, international relations, public administration, and political theory.

programs.name: Sociology
programs.description: Social theory, research methods, inequality, organizations, and culture. Tracks in social work and criminal justice.

programs.name: Psychology
programs.description: Developmental, clinical, cognitive, and social psychology. Largest undergraduate major by enrollment.

programs.name: English
programs.description: Literature, language, creative writing, and rhetoric. Strong placement in law, communications, and graduate study.

programs.name: History
programs.description: American, European, and world history. Archival research emphasis; strong pre-law pipeline.

programs.name: Philosophy
programs.description: Ethics, logic, epistemology, and metaphysics. Surprisingly strong LSAT outcomes; popular double-major with law-track programs.

programs.name: Business Administration
programs.description: Accounting, finance, marketing, operations, and management. Largest college by enrollment; AACSB accredited.

programs.name: Finance
programs.description: Corporate finance, investments, derivatives, and financial modeling. CFA exam prep embedded in curriculum.

programs.name: Accounting
programs.description: Financial and managerial accounting, auditing, and taxation. CPA 150-hour pathway available.

programs.name: Marketing
programs.description: Consumer behavior, brand strategy, digital marketing, and analytics. Integrated with data science electives.

programs.name: Nursing
programs.description: Pre-licensure BSN program. Clinical placements at Cascade Medical Center. NCLEX pass rate consistently above national mean.

programs.name: Public Health
programs.description: Epidemiology, health policy, biostatistics, and community health. Strong graduate school placement in MPH programs.

programs.name: Elementary Education
programs.description: Teacher preparation for grades K-6. Student teaching in partner school districts across the Pacific Northwest.

programs.name: Educational Leadership
programs.description: Graduate program for K-12 principals and district administrators. Cohort model; licensure-eligible in Washington, Oregon, and Idaho.

programs.name: Data Science
programs.description: Machine learning, statistical modeling, data engineering, and applied AI. Practicum with industry partners.

programs.name: Master of Business Administration
programs.description: Full-time MBA. Concentrations in finance, marketing, and technology management. AACSB accredited.

programs.name: Environmental Studies
programs.description: Ecology, environmental policy, GIS, and sustainability. Field station access on the Olympic Peninsula.

programs.name: Geography
programs.description: Human geography, physical geography, GIS, and cartography. Interdisciplinary bridge between social and natural sciences.

programs.name: Communication Studies
programs.description: Rhetoric, media studies, organizational communication, and interpersonal communication.
